path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad PBUH/Allah sent Aqa ﷺ with a religion that will prevail over all other.png
text: 933 D R @& & @ e Ao 2 aTE o o PO PR AP R URES VRN IS apvd PO Gt ox OFAN s Ao o B 2B BN oo 3025 S5 sl [9:33] He it is Who has sent His Messenger with the guidance and the True Religion that He may make it prevail over all religions, howsoever those who associate others with Allah in His Divinity might detest it.
